currentLinkedIn.headline: Co-founder & CEO at Verdant Energy | Decarbonising Industrial Heat | €12M Raised
currentLinkedIn.about: We're making industrial heat clean. Verdant deploys electrothermal storage at factories to cut Scope 1 emissions — we've avoided 18,000 tonnes of CO₂ so far. I've been building in climate for 12 years and I'm not done.

experience.title: Co-founder & CEO
bullets: Founded company in 2021; raised €12M seed and Series A from Breakthrough Energy and EQT
Signed first 10 industrial customers across Germany, Netherlands, and Sweden
Built team of 28 from zero; established culture of radical transparency and scientific rigour

experience.title: Director of Product
bullets: Led product strategy for electrolysis systems; contributed to €100M Series D fundraise materials
Managed relationships with strategic customers including Shell and Covestro
